MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s MOTION To Vacate Default Judgment And Of Nonappearance.

Grant. No opposition filed.

The court will sign the proposed order included with the moving papers.
